entry.title: New: RES25-198 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE ISSUANCE AND DELIVERY OF MULTIFAMILY HOUSING REVENUE NOTES IN A PRINCIPAL AMOUNT NOT TO EXCEED ONE HUNDRED SEVEN MILLION SEVEN HUNDRED TEN THOUSAND DOLLARS ($107,710,000) FOR THE PURPOSE OF MAKING LOANS TO PROVIDE FINANCING TO KPLR PHASE 1, LP, A HAWAIʻI LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, FOR A MULTIFAMILY RENTAL HOUSING DEVELOPMENT; DETERMINING AND PRESCRIBING CERTAIN OTHER MATTERS RELATING THERETO; AND APPROVING AND AUTHORIZING RELATED ACTIONS AND THE EXECUTION AND DELIVERY OF RELATED DOCUMENTS AND AGREEMENTS.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
